forecasts.raw_text: SW winds 10 to 15 kt with gusts up to 20 kt. Seas 2 to 3 ft. Wave detail: S 3 ft at 6 seconds and E 1 foot at 10 seconds. A slight chance of tstms. A slight chance of showers, then showers likely late.
